description: Referral loops: viral coefficients, incentive structures, word-of-mouth

items.name: Viral Coefficient (K-factor)
items.formula: K = invite_rate × conversion_rate. K > 1 = viral. K=1.5 = 10x growth.

items.name: Double-Sided Incentives
items.tactic: Referrer gets $50 credit. Referee gets $50 off. Both incentivized. Win-win.

items.name: Viral Loops (built into product)
items.tactic: Share link → friend joins → both get points. Dropbox: +1GB per referral. Simple, powerful.
